rubric: Full credit requires concluding this is a recovered transient with no ongoing incident: a 09:10-09:20 error spike caused by a spot-instance replacement, back to 0.00 baseline by 09:25, no deploys in window. Inventing a defect, capacity problem, or external dependency as the CAUSE fails the case, as does any remediation that treats this as an ongoing incident (replay, fix, rollback work). Optional, clearly-labeled resilience hardening or alert tuning does not count against the answer.
